result:
All **484 assertions pass, 0 failures**. 

Here's the summary of the 23 bugs I fixed across 9 modules:

| Module | Bug | Fix |
|--------|-----|-----|
| catalog | `product-margin` subtracted price from cost | Swapped to `price - cost` |
| catalog | `products-by-category` filtered on `product-id` | Changed to `product-category-id` |
| customers | `tier-discount-pct` had gold=5/bronze=15 | Swapped to gold=15/bronze=5 |
| inventory | `reorder-needed` used `>` (above min) | Changed to `<` (below min) |
| orders | `calculate-tax` had spurious `* 2` | Removed multiplier |
| orders | `calculate-total` added discount | Changed `+` to `-` |
| orders | `customer-discount-pct` used `customer-id` | Changed to `customer-tier` |
| shipping | `carrier-total-cost` used `carrier-id` | Changed to `carrier-base-rate` |
| shipping | `zone-surcharge` added surcharge-pct to cost | Changed to `cost * pct / 100` |
| shipping | `shipping-cost-for-order` passed `"pending"` | Changed to `order-id` |
| billing | `create-invoice` called `customer-id` with no args | Added `customer` argument |
| billing | `invoices-for-customer` used `invoice-order-id` | Changed to `invoice-customer-id` |
| billing | `mark-invoice-paid` had status/issued-at swapped | Reordered arguments |
| procurement | `lines-for-product` used `purchaseorder-supplier-id` | Changed to `poline-product-id` |
| promotions | `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` for start check | Changed to `campaign-start-date` |
| promotions | `coupon-discount-amount` divided by 10 | Changed to divide by 100 |
| promotions | `customer-eligible?` used `customer-id` | Changed to `customer-tier` |
| employees | `find-employee-by-id` compared `employee-hire-date` | Changed to `employee-id` |
| employees | `total-commission` wrapped id in `str` | Removed `str` |
| analytics | `revenue-by-period` called `orders-in-period` with 2 args | Added `orders` argument |
| notifications | `create-notification` passed 7 args to 8-field record | Added `0` for `sent-at` |
| audit | `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` for entity-id | Changed to `order-id` |
| audit | `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` for entity-id | Changed to `shipment-id` |
